title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 182.825 - Definitions
text:
182.825.  Definitions. — As used in sections 182.825 and 182.827, the following terms mean:
  (1)  "Pornographic for minors", as that term is defined in section 573.010;
  (2)  "Public access computer", a computer that is:
  (a)  Located in an elementary or secondary public school or public library;
  (b)  Frequently or regularly used directly by a minor; and
  (c)  Connected to any computer communication system.
(L. 2002 H.B. 1402)
